name: a software-architecture rule with no detector is enforced on an ADR through the native universal enforcer
command:
printf '%s
' 'rules:' '  - id: scraped-no-open-ingress' '    description: "Architecture must not expose unrestricted ingress to the public internet"' '    severity: P0' '    mode: forbid' '    applies: "*.md"' '    token: "0.0.0.0/0"' '    enforced_by: [{tool: checkov}]' > a.yaml && printf '# ADR
We expose the API with ingress 0.0.0.0/0 for simplicity.
' > adr.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/enforce-file.sh" --file adr.md --extra-rules a.yaml >/dev/null 2>e.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'rule=scraped-no-open-ingress severity=P0 detector=prose-judge.sh verdict=fail' e.txt && echo architecture-rule-enforced 1>&2
